name: Sausage Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup - undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage links and drain excess fat. Cut each link into 5 or 6 pieces.
2. Grease a loaf pan.
3. In the prepared pan, layer half of the bread cubes, grated cheddar cheese, and the sausages.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Whisk together eggs, cream, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard in a bowl.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the sausage-bread-cheese layers.
7. Carefully pour the sauce into the pan, ensuring it covers the top layer of ingredients.
8. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 50 minutes or until set.
9. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before transferring to plates.
10. Serve warm with the prepared sauce spooned over the top.
Note: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, do not rush the cooking process. Allow the dish to cook slowly in the oven at a moderate temperature for the specified time.
